title: croton sellowii
intro: Croton sellowii, also known as the Mexican flame or fire croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Croton sellowii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
